title: Ţāqah Heat Wave
lead: Ţāqah is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.80. Temperatures are extremely high, reaching a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Ţāqah has a Z-Score of +3.80, indicating a severe anomaly. 
 The Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is 12.3 GG, while the Heating Degree Days (HDD) is 0.0 GG, showing the extreme heat. 
 The relative humidity is 60% and the wind speed is 8.0 km/h, exacerbating the heat wave conditions.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the heat wave's impact.
